Article.ArticleTitle: Effects of acupoint pressure stimulation on the fatigue recovery ability of the calf muscle.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Biomedical Engineering, ShanghaiTech University, Shanghai, China.
Central Research Institute, United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd, Shanghai, China.
School of Biomedical Engineering, ShanghaiTech University, Shanghai, China.
School of Biomedical Engineering, ShanghaiTech University, Shanghai, China. zongxp@shanghaitech.edu.cn.
Shanghai Clinical Research and Trial Center, Shanghai, China. zongxp@shanghaitech.edu.cn.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of Interest: The authors have no conflict of interest to declare. Ethical approval: All experiments were approved by the Research Ethics Committee of ShanghaiTech University (ShanghaiTech BME IRB#2021–008 and Q2024-010).
